options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allLowercase
options.description: Specifies all lowercase characters for the inserted feedthrough buffer and feedthrough net names.

options.name: -autoSelectNetsByCongestion
options.description: specify the option for congestion aware feedthrough insertion flow

options.name: -autoSelectNetsBySlack
options.description: specify the option for timing driven feedthrough insertion flow

options.name: -blockageFile
options.description: Specifies a file that contains the coordinates of line segments that are considered as blockages for placement based feedthrough insertion.

options.name: -blockedEdgesFile
options.description: Specifies a file that contains the names of the partitions followed by the edge numbers for the partition which are considered as blocked for the purpose of this command.

options.name: -bufCell
options.description: Specifies the name of the feedthrough buffer cell type.

options.name: -checkOnly
options.description: Specifies that the feedthrough buffers are not inserted.

options.name: -doubleBuffer
options.description: Adds a buffer close to the feedthrough input pin and adds a buffer close to the feedthrough output pin.

options.name: -ecoFile
options.description: Specifies the file for logging ECO directives.

options.name: -excludeNet
options.description: Specifies a file that contains net names to be excluded from being a feedthrough net for a partition.

options.name: -excludePtnList
options.description: Specifies that feedthrough buffers should not be added to the specified partitions.

options.name: -instPrefix
options.description: Specifies a prefix for the newly created instances.

options.name: -netMapping
options.description: Generates a file that maps the original net name to the new net name created for the feedthrough buffers.

options.name: -netPrefix
options.description: Specifies a prefix for the newly created nets.Specifies a prefix for the newly created nets.

options.name: -noBuffer
options.description: Generates an ASSIGN statement in the netlist instead of inserting a buffer.

options.name: -repeatedSymmetricAbuttedFPlan
options.description: Applicable to master clone designs, which have repeated components arranged in a symmetric configuration with a data flow going from the top to each component independently.

options.name: -reuseBuffer
options.description: Reuses inserted buffers across multiple instantiation of a module within one run.

options.name: -routeBased
options.description: Will correct routing to preserve equivalence, enforce single entry for feedthrough path and create nets connected to two or less partition pins only

options.name: -routeBasedStrict
options.description: Follows routing strictly and places pins. Can break equivalence, does not enforce single entry and can create nets connected to three or more partition pins.

options.name: -saveTopoFile
options.description: Saves a file with feedthrough buffer topology tree information from an existing floorplan.

options.name: -selectMarkedNet
options.description: Specifies that feedthrough buffers should be inserted on the nets that are currently selected in the GUI.

options.name: -selectNet
options.description: Specifies a file that contains net names to be feedthrough nets for a partition and inserted feedthrough buffers.

options.name: -topoFile
options.description: Specifies the file that has the topology tree information.

options.name: -useShortName
options.description: Specifies the abbreviation of inserted feedthrough net names so that the net names do not extend too long for multiple runs.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Specifies that net-specific information is included in the logs.
